inline_comments.message: Are we aligned with the gid and uid that the other services are using (for example resources and traversal)?  I believe they also run as the aaiadmin user.  It could cause problems if they have a different uid and gid, as the aaiadmin user needs to be configured on the host machine.
What is this logs directory used for?  When I look at the logback file, it seems we are writing the logs to /var/log/onap.  Is anything getting written to /logs?
